senses.definition: drawings, photographs, and pictures that are prepared for publication in a book, magazine, etc.

examples.x: The magazine editor carefully selected artwork to complement the articles in the latest issue.
She spent hours creating digital artwork for her online portfolio.
The book cover featured stunning artwork that captured the essence of the story within.
The illustrator's vibrant artwork brought the characters in the children's book to life.

senses.definition: the part of a photograph, etc. that is situated behind the main figures, etc.

examples.x: The photographer adjusted the lighting to highlight the background behind the main subject.
She chose a plain background for her passport photo to ensure clarity.
The artist painted a detailed background to complement the central figures in the portrait.
The background of the historical painting depicted a bustling city street in the 19th century.
The designer used a gradient background to enhance the overall aesthetic of the website.

senses.definition: the part of a scene, photograph, etc. that is closest to the observer

examples.x: He placed an old truck tire in the foreground to add visual interest and texture against the snow-covered field behind it.
The out-of-focus trees in the foreground serve to softly separate the midground from the photogenic mountains framing the valley.
The photographer used a shallow depth of field to draw attention to the flowers in the foreground and blur the background.
The photographer adjusted the focus to capture the details in the foreground of the landscape.
In the painting, the artist skillfully blended colors to emphasize the figures in the foreground.

senses.definition: someone who gathers things, as a job or hobby

examples.x: The art collector spent millions on a rare painting at the auction.
The museum reached out to a renowned artifact collector to procure pieces for their upcoming exhibit.
As a passionate art collector, she traveled the world in search of unique and valuable pieces to add to her gallery.
The antique collector spent years scouring flea markets and estate sales to find rare and valuable artifacts for their collection.

senses.definition: a professional who designs or creates visual content using various things, such as digital tools, illustration, photography, etc.

examples.x: As a graphic artist, she enjoys experimenting with different styles and techniques to create visually compelling artwork.
The graphic artist's illustrations added a whimsical touch to the children's book, captivating young readers with vibrant colors and imaginative characters.
With her background in graphic design, she pursued a career as a freelance graphic artist, offering her services to clients worldwide.
The graphic artist designed the logo for the company's new product, incorporating elements that reflected its brand identity.

senses.definition: a piece of art created with great skill, which is an artist's best work

examples.x: The Mona Lisa is often regarded as Leonardo da Vinci's masterpiece, admired by millions worldwide.
After years of dedication, the artist finally unveiled what critics called his masterpiece.
The sculpture was hailed as a masterpiece, showcasing the artist's exceptional talent and vision.
She spent months perfecting her painting, hoping it would be considered her masterpiece.
The gallery's centerpiece was a masterpiece that captured the essence of human emotion.

senses.definition: a public event in which objects such as paintings, photographs, etc. are shown

examples.x: The museum's latest exhibit features a stunning collection of contemporary art from around the world.
Visitors were impressed by the interactive exhibits at the science center, which allowed them to engage with various scientific concepts.
The artist's exhibit at the gallery received rave reviews from critics and art enthusiasts alike.
The history museum's exhibit on ancient civilizations provided fascinating insights into life thousands of years ago.
The zoo's newest exhibit showcases endangered species and highlights conservation efforts to protect their habitats.

senses.definition: a person's or an object's visual representation in art

examples.x: The advertising campaign used powerful images to evoke emotion and convey the brand's message effectively.
The logo design featured a simple yet memorable image of a soaring eagle, symbolizing strength and freedom.

senses.definition: a style of painting that deals with the nature

examples.x: Her latest landscape depicted a serene forest scene at sunset.
He used vibrant colors to bring his landscape to life, emphasizing the natural beauty of the countryside.

senses.definition: a painting of a person that is created by the same person

examples.x: Vincent van Gogh's self-portrait reveals much about his emotional state and artistic style.
She decided to challenge herself by creating a self-portrait for her next project.
The artist's self-portrait was both intimate and expressive, showcasing his unique perspective.
He hung his self-portrait in the hallway, where it drew compliments from visitors.
The self-portrait captured not only his likeness

senses.definition: the specific theme or topic that a work of art, speech, etc. contains

examples.x: The artist's paintings often explore the subject matter of human emotions and relationships, creating poignant and evocative imagery.
In literature, the subject matter of a novel can range from personal identity and societal issues to historical events and fantastical worlds.
The documentary film delves into the subject matter of environmental conservation, raising awareness about the importance of protecting natural habitats.
As a historian, her research focuses on the subject matter of ancient civilizations and their cultural contributions to modern society.
The poet's work grapples with the subject matter of mortality and the passage of time, reflecting on the fleeting nature of existence.

senses.definition: any variation of one color, including darker or lighter versions

examples.x: She carefully selected the perfect shade of blue for the walls of her bedroom, aiming for a calming and tranquil atmosphere.
He struggled to find the right shade of lipstick to match her dress for the evening.

senses.definition: a black or colored liquid used for drawing, writing, etc.

examples.x: The artist used black ink to create intricate line drawings in their sketchbook.
The printer ran out of ink halfway through printing the document, causing delays in the office.
The calligrapher mixed different colors of ink to create a unique palette for their wedding invitations.
The tattoo artist carefully selected the ink colors for the client's design, ensuring vibrant and long-lasting results.

senses.definition: a thick paint that has oil in it, allowing artists to mix colors and work in layers to achieve the desired effects

examples.x: The artist preferred using oil paint for their portraits due to its versatility and ability to capture subtle nuances of light and shadow.
She applied thick layers of oil paint to the canvas, creating textured landscapes that seemed to come alive with vibrant colors.
He prefers the vibrant colors and rich texture of oil paint over other mediums for his landscape paintings.
She enjoys the soothing rhythm of applying oil paint to canvas, losing herself in the creative process.
The art class offered instruction on various painting mediums, including watercolor, acrylic, and oil paint, catering to students' preferences and interests.

senses.definition: the art or practice of painting with watercolors

examples.x: She enjoyed spending her weekends practicing watercolor techniques by the lake.
His watercolor paintings were known for their delicate brushwork and subtle color blends.
The artist taught a workshop on how to create vibrant scenes using watercolor.
She admired the watercolor portrait for its soft hues and ethereal quality.
He purchased a set of high-quality watercolors to experiment with different styles and textures.

senses.definition: (of a form of art) showing forms, colors, or shapes that do not represent real-world objects, focusing on ideas or emotions instead

examples.x: She is known for her abstract sculptures that explore the interplay of shapes, colors, and textures.
The artist used bold strokes and vibrant colors to create an abstract composition that evoked a sense of energy and movement.
The dancers performed a mesmerizing abstract routine, blending fluid movements with unexpected angles and shapes.
The film incorporated abstract imagery and surreal elements to convey the protagonist's inner emotional journey.
The gallery featured an exhibit of abstract paintings that challenged traditional notions of representation.

senses.definition: involving artists or their work

examples.x: The artistic expression of the painting captured the beauty of nature.
She possessed an artistic flair, effortlessly creating stunning sculptures from clay.
The theater production was praised for its artistic direction and innovative set design.
The museum featured an exhibition of artistic masterpieces from renowned painters.

senses.definition: created firsthand by an artist or creator, not reproduced

examples.x: The painting was an original work by the artist, not a reproduction.
The antique vase in the museum's collection was an original piece from the Ming Dynasty, not a modern reproduction.
The antique watch was verified as original by the expert, ensuring its authenticity and value.
The ancient artifact was identified as an original artifact from the archaeological site, not a modern replica.

senses.definition: depicting things as what they are in real life

examples.x: The artist's realistic portrayal of the cityscape captured every detail, from the bustling streets to the towering skyscrapers.
She prefers watching realistic dramas that reflect the complexities of everyday life over fantasy or science fiction.
The novelist's realistic characters and dialogue made the story feel authentic and relatable to readers.
The simulation game offers a highly realistic experience, mimicking real-world physics and scenarios.
His sculptures are known for their realistic portrayal of the human form.

senses.definition: simple, traditional, and appealing, with a timeless quality that stays in fashion regardless of trends

examples.x: She wore a classic black dress that looked elegant and timeless.
The car’s classic design made it stand out among newer models.
His classic leather watch never goes out of style.
They decorated their home with classic furniture that feels both stylish and enduring.
A classic grey suit is perfect for any formal occasion, regardless of changing trends.

senses.definition: (of a style in architecture, music, art, etc.) recently formed and different from traditional styles and forms

examples.x: The modern music genre of electronic dance music (EDM) incorporates synthesized beats and digital effects, departing from traditional instruments and melodies.
The modern literature movement of the 20th century, characterized by stream-of-consciousness writing and experimental narratives, challenged traditional storytelling conventions.

senses.definition: belonging to the current era

examples.x: We studied the contemporary political landscape to understand today's issues.
Technologies like smartphones have become an integral part of contemporary daily life.
I enjoy movies and TV shows that reflect contemporary cultural experiences.
Her novel explores contemporary issues that parallel ongoing social changes.

senses.definition: related to sight or vision

examples.x: The doctor performed a visual examination of the patient's eyes.
Visual aids such as charts and diagrams can enhance learning in classrooms.
Visual perception involves the brain's interpretation of visual stimuli received through the eyes.

senses.definition: (of colors or light) very intense or bright

examples.x: She wore a vivid red dress that stood out in the crowd.
The artist used vivid blues and greens to depict the ocean in the painting.
The flowers in the garden were a vivid display of color, brightening up the landscape.
His vivid yellow car attracted attention wherever he drove.
The vivid green leaves on the trees signaled the arrival of spring.

senses.definition: to represent or show something or someone by a work of art

examples.x: The painting depicts a serene landscape, with rolling hills and a tranquil river winding through the valley.
In the sculpture, the artist depicts a mother cradling her child, capturing the tenderness of maternal love.
The mural on the city wall depicts scenes from local history, showcasing significant events and figures.
The photograph depicts a bustling city street, capturing the energy and diversity of urban life.
The stained glass window in the church depicts religious scenes from the Bible.

senses.definition: to publicly show something

examples.x: The museum carefully displayed ancient artifacts in glass cases for visitors to admire.
The artist set up an easel to display their latest masterpiece in the art gallery.
The shop window was used to display the latest fashion trends and accessories.
During the science fair, students created posters to display their research findings.
The digital screen in the conference room was used to display the presentation slides.

senses.definition: to present or show something publicly to inform or entertain an audience

examples.x: The art gallery will exhibit a collection of contemporary paintings next month.
The science museum plans to exhibit interactive displays on space exploration.
The historical society will exhibit artifacts from the town's founding at the upcoming event.
The technology conference will exhibit the latest innovations in the field.
The zoo will exhibit rare species of birds in a new aviary.

senses.definition: to put a work of art in a solid border

examples.x: She decided to frame the artwork in a sleek black frame to enhance its modern aesthetic.
To commemorate the moment, they chose to frame the family photo and hang it in the hallway.
The artist preferred to frame their paintings with ornate, vintage-style frames for added elegance.
He wanted to frame the certificate of achievement and display it prominently on the office wall.
I need to frame this picture before putting it on the mantle.

senses.definition: to make something happen or be created by giving rise to ideas

examples.x: The movie inspired a new wave of fashion trends.
The novel inspired several adaptations into films and plays.
The scientist's discovery inspired further research into the disease.
The artist’s work inspired an entire exhibition showcasing modern art.
The ancient texts inspired a deep understanding of the universe in those who studied them.

senses.definition: to create a smaller representation of something using wood, etc.

examples.x: He modeled a scale replica of the famous landmark using wood and cardboard.
The architect modeled the new building design with foam board and glue.
Can you model a prototype of the new product for the presentation?
The sculptor frequently models miniature versions of famous landmarks.

senses.definition: to repair a work of art, building, etc. so that it is in a good condition again

examples.x: The museum hired experts to restore the ancient painting to its original beauty.
They restored the historic building to its former grandeur, preserving its architectural details.
The craftsmen carefully restored the antique furniture, removing scratches and restoring the wood's luster.
After the fire, they worked tirelessly to restore the damaged house to its former glory.
The team worked for months to restore the old cathedral’s damaged windows.
